sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43929" key="eu)h/rutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐήρῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρύω</foreign> A) <sense id="n43929.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good to draw</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὕδωρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">106</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
